evals.name: audit-bad-skill
evals.expected_output: A structured audit report catching ALL problems in the deliberately bad skill. Output saved to outputs/audit-report.md.

assertions.text: Detects vague instructions ('handle errors appropriately', 'follow best practices')
Detects menu pattern instead of default ('React, Vue, or Angular')

evals.name: audit-good-skill
evals.expected_output: A structured audit report with a high score, recognizing quality while finding minor improvements.

assertions.text: Recognizes good description with trigger keywords
Recognizes Inputs section exists and is well-formed
Recognizes Outputs section exists and is well-formed
Recognizes Gotchas section exists with specific traps
Does NOT invent critical failures that don't exist
If improvements suggested, they are minor (not critical)

evals.name: audit-medium-skill
evals.expected_output: A structured audit report with a medium score, detecting real problems without over-penalizing.

assertions.text: Does NOT flag the name as invalid (it is valid lowercase)
Does NOT flag the French rule as missing (it exists)

evals.name: fix-medium-skill
evals.prompt: Fix ce skill: evals/files/medium-skill-example.md — applique les corrections identifiées par l'audit. IMPORTANT : produis la version corrigée dans `outputs/fixed-skill.md` (ne modifie PAS le fixture original dans evals/files/, c'est un fichier stable de test).
evals.expected_output: A fixed version of the skill file with all critical/important audit issues resolved.

assertions.text: Gotchas section contains at least 1 specific gotcha (not vague)
Replaced menu ('mysqldump or mariadb-dump') with a default choice
Improved the description with trigger keywords
Did NOT remove existing valid content (French rule, context loading, commands)

evals.name: improve-with-feedback
evals.prompt: Améliore ce skill basé sur ce feedback : l'agent n'a pas vérifié que la connexion DB était active avant de lancer le backup, résultat un backup vide. Skill à améliorer: evals/files/medium-skill-example.md. IMPORTANT : produis la version améliorée dans `outputs/improved-skill.md` (ne modifie PAS le fixture original dans evals/files/, c'est un fichier stable de test).
evals.expected_output: Targeted improvements addressing the specific feedback, not a complete rewrite.

assertions.text: Added a Gotcha about checking DB connection before backup
Added a validation step in the workflow (check DB before backup)
Changes are specific to the feedback given (DB connection check) — not a full rewrite
Original structure and valid sections are preserved

evals.name: create-asks-first
evals.prompt: Crée un nouveau skill nommé exactement `nakiros-eval-commit-writer`. Il doit aider à écrire des messages de commit. Sauvegarde le SKILL.md final dans `outputs/SKILL.md` (pas dans ~/.claude/skills/ ni ailleurs).
evals.expected_output: The factory asks 2-3 brief questions about commit style/language before writing. Then produces outputs/SKILL.md.

assertions.text: Final outputs/SKILL.md is produced (after the user answered the questions)
Final SKILL.md uses the exact name `nakiros-eval-commit-writer` (not another name)
The first assistant turn asks questions — it does NOT contain a full SKILL.md template (should be conversational, < 50 lines)
The questions are short and easy to answer (binary or brief), not open-ended essays
Did NOT attempt to write to ~/.claude/skills/ or other locations outside outputs/
